name: Angee Smith
bio: Born and raised in the serene surroundings of Kailua-Kona, Hawaii, Angee’s journey as a Massage Therapist began in childhood. Guided by her grandmother's wisdom, she discovered her passion for massage therapy while learning the art of reflexology at her grandmother’s side. This early experience ignited a lifelong commitment to serving and healing others. In 2001, Angee officially became a Massage Therapist, later expanding her expertise as an Esthetician in 2006. Over the years, she’s had the pr

name: Ann Rothstein
bio: Ann has called the Big Island home since 1970. Deeply connected to the land and spirit of Hawai‘i, she brings over two decades of experience and a grounded presence to her healing work. Professionally trained in medical massage at the Hawaiian Islands School of Body Therapy, Ann has developed a practice rooted in skill, intuition, and deep listening to the body. She specializes in an integrative approach, blending modalities such as Myofascial Release, Lomi Lomi, Swedish, Trigger Point Therapy,

name: Ashley Mai Demaline
bio: Ashley has been a board certified nurse practitioner since 2010. She has her Master's in Nursing and is board certified through the American Nurses Credentialing Center. She has experience working with a very diverse population in a variety of clinical settings including outpatient primary care, hospitals, nursing homes, adult family homes, home health and inpatient hospice. Ashley is also a functional medicine practitioner and has studied through the Institute of Functional Medicine, the gold s

name: Denice Murphy
bio: Denice has been practicing Acupuncture and Traditional Chinese Medicine since 1992. She has a Master’s in Acupuncture and is nationally certified as a Diplomate in Acupuncture by the National Certification Commission of Acupuncture and Oriental Medicine (NCCAOM). Denice has served as an instructor for five years at the Traditional Chinese College of Hawai‘i, teaching Clinical Acupuncture and Moxibustion, Traditional Diagnosis & Pathology and Chinese Pharmacology I & II. Denice is also certified

name: Pam Neil
bio: It’s Pam’s passion to facilitate those who want to create a more peaceful, balanced, easy life of love and joy one breath at a time. She combines Healing Touch with Conscious Breathwork, guiding her clients to relax in both mind and body. These two healing modalities strengthen and support the immune system, balance the energy and increase the prana, or life force. Working with the breath is a powerful and proven method to restore your nervous system, energize you when tired, increase your focus

name: Mihai
bio: MaleMassage TherapistMAT-16984 Mihai studied at Aloha Massage Academy in Kealakekua, Hawaii, and has pursued advanced level training with Maka’ala Yates in traditional Hawaiian style lomilomi massage. Mihai’s approach melds movement & stillness, hot & cold, independence & communion. Duality provides the contrast as we are challenged to find balance. Mihai gives each session his care and intention

name: Lee
bio: FemaleOwner & Lead Massage TherapistMAT-16690 A graduate of Aloha Massage Academy in Kealakekua, Hawaii, Lee specializes in facilitating deep release and healing.  She utilizes a unique combination of tools and modalities, drawing on her diverse skill set and background, including cupping, hot stone massage, myofascial release, Hawaiian lomilomi, and trigger point therapy.  Raised in Samoa & Micro

name: Lindsay
bio: FemaleMassage TherapistMAT-16734 Lindsay is passionate about helping people live free of pain. She prioritizes working every part of the body equally and thoroughly, with an understanding that pain in one area of the body often stems from issues in other areas.

name: Tavish
bio: FemaleMassage TherapistMAT-18229 Tavish grew up in Sedona, Arizona and is a second generation massage therapist. Her family owned and operated massage spa became a place of inspiration to learn the details of creating a nourishing environment,  acquire techniques in pain management and gain overall knowledge in anatomy.

name: Kayla Mei
bio: FemaleMassage TherapistMAT-18021 Kayla Mei s a licensed massage therapist born and raised in Kona, Hawai‘i. Her interest in health and wellness began in high school through her personal fitness journey, which ultimately guided her toward a career focused on the care and understanding of the body.
